title: coelogyne anfracta
intro: Coelogyne anfracta, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical forests in India and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Coelogyne anfracta include its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve immune function. Coelogyne anfracta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and health benefits.
